source.file:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS admins ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, email TEXT NOT NULL, username TEXT NOT NULL, app_id INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (email, app_id) REFERENCES users(email, app_id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE,
UNIQUE(email, app_id), UNIQUE(username, app_id) );
DROP TABLE admins;

version: "3"
tasks: migrateUp: aliases: - up desc: "Apply all migrations" cmds: - go run ./cmd/migrator --storage-path=./storage/sso.db --migrations-path=./migrations migrateDown: aliases: - down desc: "Rollback all migrations" cmds: - go run ./cmd/migrator --storage-path=./storage/sso.db --migrations-path=./migrations -down
build: aliases: - bl desc: "Build main.go" cmds: - go build -o bin/sso cmd/sso/main.go compose: desc: "docker-compose" cmds: - docker-compose down -v - docker-compose up -d --build

env: 'local' # dev, prod access_token_ttl: 5m refresh_token_ttl: 168h grpc: port: 1337 timeout: 1488h rps: 3 burst: 6 postgres: port: 5432 host: 'postgres-sso' reaper_delay: 3h redis: port: 6379 host: 'redis-sso' timeout: 15s retries: 3 http: rps: 3 burst: 6 visitor_cleaner_delay: 3h

package storage
import "errors"
var ( ErrUserExists = errors.New("user already exists") ErrUserNotFound = errors.New("user not found") ErrAppNotFound = errors.New("app not found") ErrAppExists = errors.New("app already exists") //ErrEmptyDB = errors.New("database is empty") ErrUserDeleted = errors.New("user deleted") ErrTokenNotFound = errors.New("token not found") )

package models
type App struct { ID int64 Name string Secret string RedirectURI string }

TrustMeBroID - it's a best sso service designed for best pet projects
---
## API
### gRPC
Admin methods require the `x-admin-token` metadata header.
| Method | Auth | Description | | ------------- | ----- | --------------------------------------- | | `Register` | — | Register a new user in an App | | `Login` | — | Login by email or username, returns JWT | | `IsAdmin` | — | Check if a user has admin role | | `RegisterApp` | admin | Create a new App | | `DeleteApp` | admin | Delete an App | | `DeleteUser` | admin | Delete a user by email / username / ID | | `DeleteAdmin` | admin | Revoke admin role | | `MakeAdmin` | admin | Add Admin user from existing one |
### HTTP
| Endpoint | Method | Description | | ----------------------------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------- | | `/auth/github/login?app_id=X` | GET | Redirect to GitHub OAuth | | `/auth/github/callback` | GET | OAuth callback, redirects to `uri?token=JWT` |

MASTER_KEY=9ee478c4b87b9b8e603447dbfb26a093 ADMIN_TOKEN=5b5fc7dd7c324d8c0c04b5057a856e18 HTTP_BIND_ADDR=:7171 GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=Ov23liRkbUCOznI3ppJk GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=90f73e43e347fbb594cb9bb6296c3802188e8708 BASE_URL=http://localhost:7171 LOCAL_URL=http://localhost:7171 DB_USER=mxwq DB_PASSWORD=9ee478c4b87b9b8e603447dbfb26a093 DB_NAME=sso CONFIG_PATH=/app/config/local.yaml REFRESH_KEY=5b5fc7dd7c324d8c0c04b5057a856e18 REDIS_PW=9ee478c4b87b9b8e603447dbfb26a093

services: postgres-sso: image: postgres:alpine ports: - 5432:5432 restart: always env_file: - .env environment: POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD} POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME} healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER} -d ${DB_NAME}"] interval: 1s timeout: 5s retries: 3 networks: - shared-net redis-sso: image: redis:latest ports: - 6379:6379 restart: always env_file: - .env healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "redis-cli ping | grep PONG"] interval: 1s timeout: 3s retries: 5 networks: - shared-net
migrator: image: migrate/migrate networks: - shared-net env_file: - .env depends_on: postgres-sso: condition: service_healthy volumes: - ./migrations:/migrations command: [ "-path", "/migrations/", "-database", "postgres://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres-sso:5432/${DB_NAME}?sslmode=disable", "up", ]
sso: build: . ports: - "1337:1337" - "7171:7171" volumes: - ./storage:/app/storage - ./config:/app/config env_file: - .env environment: - PGSSLMODE=disable networks: - shared-net depends_on: migrator: condition: service_completed_successfully redis-sso: condition: service_healthy
networks: shared-net: external: true

MASTER_KEY= ADMIN_TOKEN= HTTP_BIND_ADDR=:7171 GITHUB_CLIENT_ID= GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET= BASE_URL=http://localhost:7171 LOCAL_URL=http://localhost:7171 DB_USER= DB_PASSWORD= DB_NAME= CONFIG_PATH=/app/config/local.yaml REFRESH_KEY=<>
